category_sources: source_facts.description; official homepage and SourceForge page identify it as a real-time strategy game.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading and SourceForge summary use Seven Kingdoms: Ancient Adversaries.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the main project and gameplay information surface; official 7kfans PDF is a game manual/download document.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage states SourceForge is used for files and source repository; SourceForge project has Git entry '7kaa source'.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official homepage describes strategy gameplay and SourceForge categorizes it as Real Time Strategy with SDL UI.
